notes: Persisted via SECURITY DEFINER RPC public.offmarket_persist_vet_row(jsonb) to keep the MCP execute_sql payloads small.

23 signals with direction='neutral' were dropped because the business_signals_direction_check CHECK constraint only allows ('positive','negative','disqualifying'). Dropping preserves semantic meaning better than reclassifying.
All 65 rows upserted on (vertical, legal_name, city, state). Existing business_signals rows were deleted before insert to avoid duplicates within a re-run.
